description: Your inbox is cluttered with a mix of new topics and reply threads. Organize it by creating a folder named 'Replies-Archive' and moving all emails with 'Re:' or 'RE:' in the subject from the Inbox to this folder. Mark all remaining emails in the Inbox as 'Starred' or 'Important'. Count these remaining new topic emails and send a report to 'manager@company.com' with the subject 'Inbox Status' and a body stating the exact number found (e.g., 'There are 12 new topics').
